mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SYS_PARAMETER_LOG( ID, OPERATION_TYPE, PARAM_CD_OLD, PARAM_NM_OLD, PARAM_VAL_OLD, REMARK_OLD, PARAM_CD_NEW, PARAM_NM_NEW, PARAM_VAL_NEW, REMARK_NEW, FLAG, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME )VALUES ( #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{operationType, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{paramCdOld, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{paramNmOld, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{paramValOld, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remarkOld, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{paramCdNew, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{paramNmNew, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{paramValNew, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remarkNew, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{flag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId}, #{loginUserName}, #{now} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE SYS_PARAMETER_LOG SET ID = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, OPERATION_TYPE = #{operationType,jdbcType=BIGINT}, PARAM_CD_OLD = #{paramCdOld, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PARAM_NM_OLD = #{paramNmOld, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PARAM_VAL_OLD = #{paramValOld, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REMARK_OLD = #{remarkOld, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PARAM_CD_NEW = #{paramCdNew, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PARAM_NM_NEW = #{paramNmNew, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PARAM_VAL_NEW = #{paramValNew, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REMARK_NEW = #{remarkNew, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, FLAG = #{flag,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CREATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, CREATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CREATE_TIME = #{now}
id = #{id}
